title: Detached JWS Signature (v0.1)
description: A detached JWS compact serialisation (RFC 7515) of the form '<protected-header>..<signature>' where the middle (payload) segment is empty. The signed bytes are supplied out-of-band and MUST be the JCS canonicalisation (RFC 8785) of the enclosing object with the 'signature' field removed. The base64url-encoded protected header MUST contain 'alg':'EdDSA' and a 'kid' string identifying the signing key. See ADR 0004 and docs/spec/v0.1/signing.md.
